architecture.summary: No architecture changes. Adding validateEnum helper and isEvalVerdict type guard to existing files. No new modules or dependencies.

integrations.summary: No new integrations. Fixes affect internal platform-security API response parsing, verdict.ts utilities, and RunPanel.tsx UI helpers. External API contract unchanged.

ui-ux.summary: No visible UI changes. RunPanel.tsx fixes are type-level only (removing | string from signatures, tightening Record types). No rendering behavior changes.

performance.summary: Adding AbortSignal.timeout(10_000) to platform-security fetch prevents indefinite hangs. Set-based enum validation adds negligible overhead (O(1) lookups).

security.summary: CRITICAL fix: empty providers array no longer silently produces all-clear verdict. HIGH fix: runtime validation prevents malformed API responses from bypassing security checks. NaN guard prevents criticalCount bypass.

edge-cases.summary: Empty providers → PENDING verdict. Lowercase enum values normalized to uppercase. NaN criticalCount → 0. Invalid enum strings → PENDING fallback. FAIL/DEGRADING with score [0.4, 0.7) now gets recommendations. Negative scores clamped to 0 in formatComparisonScore.
